steps.t: Sikût has asked you to look for his missing pendant while you are in Zakhûr and return it to him. Zakhûr is an encampment east of Khanâg Gur in An Shê…
You have arrived at Zakhûr. Sikût has asked you to look for his missing pendant while you are in Zakhûr and return it to him.
You have found the pendant that Sikût asked you to look for in Zakhûr. You should bring it to him in Khanâg Gur.
